hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
# first run: Apr 9, 2026 cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/update_resources/connectors
# OK 1: This will add higherClassification in taxon.tab and rebuild the DwCA. With carry-over of other extensions. # No parentID but has ancestry, though limited still. ###php dwca_utility.php _ '{"resource_id": "AntWeb_textmined", "task": "gen_hC_using_ancestry"}' #using kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus # generates AntWeb_textmined-with-hC.tar.gz
# OK 2: This use gnparser one name at a time. Not entire file. ###php run_gnparser_dwca.php _ '{"resource_id": "AntWeb_textmined-with-hC"}' #gen neo4j_1 # generates AntWeb_textmined-with-hC_neo4j_1.tar.gz
# OK 3: Start matching taxa ###php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "AntWeb_textmined-with-hC"}' #gen neo4j_2 # generates AntWeb_textmined-with-hC_neo4j_2.tar.gz # Here is version for Zenodo. Next versions are for importing to Neo4j.
# OK 4: Convert taxon.tab, use EOLid value for taxonID. # REMINDER: Multiple scinames with different taxonIDs may have the same canonical thus will have the same EOLid # Reminder: All taxonID is now EOLid. Images from Media tab now excluded. php use_EOLid_as_taxonID.php _ '{"resource_id": "AntWeb_textmined-with-hC"}' # gen neo4j_3 # generates AntWeb_textmined-with-hC_neo4j_3.tar.gz
# rename cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/applications/content_server/resources_3 cp AntWeb_textmined-with-hC_neo4j_3.tar.gz AntWeb_textmined_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz ls -lt AntWeb_textmined-with-hC_neo4j_3.tar.gz ls -lt AntWeb_textmined_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz rm -f AntWeb_textmined-with-hC_neo4j_3.tar.gz
exit 0
# Generate CSV files for Neo4j: OK ###cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/update_resources/connectors ###php generate_csv_4neo4j.php _ '{"resource_id": "AntWeb_textmined_TraitBank_1_0"}' #latest
